title: Chicken Katsu Noodle Stir Fry
description: A Japanese-inspired stir fry made with crispy katsu chicken, noodles, and roasted vegetables. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: roasted vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, bell peppers, and broccoli

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the roasted vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender.
Add the noodles to the skillet and cook until heated through.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce and sugar.
Serve the chicken and noodles hot, garnished with sesame seeds if desired.
